channel.title: Open-Source on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Open-Source on simeononsecurity

item.title: ATS Resume Improver: Free, Self-Hostable AI Resume Optimizer That Never Phones Home
item.category: "Career Tools" , "Open Source Projects" , "Artificial Intelligence" , "Privacy Technology" , "Developer Tools" , "Job Hunting" , "Productivity"
item.description: ATS Resume Improver is a free, open-source, client-side resume optimizer supporting OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, and local Ollama models. Parse, score, keyword-match, optimize, and export your resume — all without your data leaving the browser.

item.title: Software Development Career Playbook: From First Commit to Engineering Lead
item.category: "software development career" , "software engineering" , "career playbook" , "programming" , "developer career" , "career guidance" , "professional development"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and leading a software development career. Covers programming languages, education paths, job searching, career advancement, and engineering leadership.

item.title: Eye Spy: Passive Surveillance Detector for the M5Stack Atom Lite (ESP32)
item.category: "Privacy Tools" , "Counter-Surveillance" , "IoT Security" , "Embedded Systems" , "Security Research" , "WiFi Security" , "Bluetooth Security" , "ESP32 Projects" , "Hardware Security" , "Open Source Security"
item.description: A complete technical reference for Eye Spy v1.1 - an open-source passive BLE and WiFi surveillance detector running on the M5Stack Atom Lite (ESP32-PICO-D4) that scans for body cameras, ALPR systems, AirTags, drones, and hidden cameras using a confidence-score threat model and a single RGB LED.

item.title: ESP32 WiFi Canary: Passive 2.4 GHz Threat Detection with RGB LED Alerts
item.category: "Network Security" , "WiFi Security" , "IoT Security" , "Security Research" , "Embedded Systems" , "Privacy Tools" , "ESP32 Projects" , "Hardware Security" , "Wireless Security" , "Open Source Security"
item.description: A detailed breakdown into the ESP32 WiFi Canary project - a compact, passive 2.4 GHz awareness sensor for the M5Stack Atom Lite that silently watches for evil-twin APs, deauthentication attacks, security downgrades, and beacon floods using a confidence-scored threat model and a single RGB LED.

item.title: CompTIA Linux+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the XK0-005 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA Linux+ Course" , "Linux Certification" , "System Administration" , "Linux Security" , "Shell Scripting" , "CompTIA Certification" , "DevOps" , "Container Technologies" , "Linux Troubleshooting" , "Open Source"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA Linux+ (XK0-005) study course covering system management, security, scripting and automation, containers, and troubleshooting for Linux environments.

item.title: SyncThing vs FreeFileSync: Which is Best for Effortless File Sync?

item.description: Discover the ultimate file sync solution between SyncThing and FreeFileSync. Effortless data management for all your devices.

item.title: Securing Windows and Linux: PowerShell vs. Python - Cybersecurity Comparison
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Scripting Languages" , "System Security" , "Windows" , "Linux" , "Government Regulations" , "Cyber Threats" , "Secure Scripting" , "Compliance" , "Programming"
item.description: Discover effortless ways to enhance system security with PowerShell and Python in this comprehensive cybersecurity analysis.

item.title: LibreWolf vs Firefox: A Comprehensive Comparison of Privacy-Focused Browsers

item.description: Explore the features of LibreWolf and Firefox, two privacy-focused browsers, to make an informed choice for enhanced online security and privacy.

item.title: Best Privacy Browsers 2026: LibreWolf vs Brave vs Firefox vs Tor Complete Comparison
item.category: "Browsers" , "Privacy" , "Security" , "Internet" , "Technology" , "Digital Privacy" , "Online Safety" , "Open Source" , "Anonymity" , "Web Browsing"
item.description: Comprehensive 2026 comparison of the best privacy-focused browsers: LibreWolf, Brave, Firefox, Tor, and more. Detailed privacy tests, performance benchmarks, and security analysis to protect your online data.

item.title: Choosing a Password Manager: A Comprehensive Guide for Enhanced Security

item.title: Ansible Automation: From Plain Ansible to Ansible Tower and Semaphore

item.description: Discover the power of Ansible automation with a comparison of plain Ansible, Ansible Tower, and Ansible Semaphore, and choose the right tool for efficient infrastructure management.

item.title: Recommended Messengers
